title: JSONPath Support — Regular expressions in JSONPath
text:
JSONPath regular expressions are not supported. If you want to match using regular expressions, you can use a tool such as
jq
.
# kubectl does not support regular expressions for JSONpath output
# The following command does not work
kubectl get pods -o
jsonpath
=
'{.items[?(@.metadata.name=~/^test$/)].metadata.name}'
# The following command achieves the desired result
kubectl get pods -o json
|
jq -r
'.items[] | select(.metadata.name | test("test-")).metadata.name'
